prompt: Using the provided mask picture, generate a realistic beach scene with the people placed according to the mask
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a beach scene. Integrate four people into the scene, ensuring their positions, relative sizes, and shapes precisely match the colored silhouettes depicted in image 1. The scene should feature a primary figure centrally, another person positioned immediately to their right, and two partially visible individuals on the left side of the frame, consistent with the spatial arrangement in image 1.
objects: primary figure centrally with characteristics of the central green silhouette
person immediately to the right of the primary figure with characteristics of the right yellow/brown silhouette
partially visible person on the left side of the frame with characteristics of the red silhouette
partially visible person on the far left side of the frame with characteristics of the blue silhouette
